pages.label: Cover and charge
pages.text: RESTRICTED — PROSECUTION DISCLOSURE BUNDLE URN: 26/DA/025 Defendant: Jordan Clarke Court: Crown Court at Northgate === SECTION: COVER_INDEX === INDEX Document | Pages | Note Charge sheet | 1 | MG5 case summary | 2-3 | MG6C disclosure schedule | 4 | Officer statement | 5 | Encro message extracts | 6-7 | Exhibit list | 8 | Court listing | 9 | === SECTION: CHARGE === R v Jordan Clarke Statement of Offence: Being concerned in the supply of a controlled drug of Class A, namely cocaine, contrary to section 4(2)(b) of  the Misuse of Drugs Act 1971. Particulars of Offence: Between 1 November 2025 and 28 February 2026 were concerned in the supply of cocaine to others.

pages.label: MG5 (1/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG5 === MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT URN: 26/DA/025 Officer in case: DS Reid 4401 Headline Summary Encro-style message extracts are served. Handle NORTH-12 appears in thread. Mapping of handle/phone to  Jordan Clarke is not proved on current papers. Platform extraction, attribution report, subscriber data, and  device continuity are outstanding. Chronological summary 11/2025 — Operation targeting county-lines network on Encro-style platform.

pages.label: MG5 (2/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG5 === 01/2026 — Message extracts obtained; schedule served as JC/MSG/01. 02/2026 — Jordan Clarke arrested; handset seized; full download not on bundle. 02/2026 — MG6C updated: platform extraction referred; handle attribution report outstanding. Evidence on file (served) Charge sheet; MG5; MG6C; officer statement; message extracts JC/MSG/01; exhibit list. Evidence referred or outstanding Platform/source extraction; handle attribution report; subscriber/account data; device continuity; full download/ export.

pages.label: MG6C schedule
pages.text: === SECTION: MG6 === MG6C — UNUSED MATERIAL SCHEDULE MG6C/ENC/01 — Encro message extracts JC/MSG/01 — served on bundle. MG6C/ENC/02 — Platform/source extraction — referred — export not attached. MG6C/ENC/03 — Handle attribution report (NORTH-12) — outstanding — not on bundle. MG6C/ENC/04 — Subscriber/account data — outstanding. MG6C/ENC/05 — Device continuity — outstanding. MG6C/ENC/06 — Co-defendant material — outstanding — segregate per defendant. MG6C/ENC/07 — Full download/export — outstanding.

pages.label: Officer statement
pages.text: === SECTION: OFFICER_STMT === OFFICER STATEMENT — DS Reid 4401 1. This case concerns an Encro-style messaging platform. 2. Message extracts JC/MSG/01 are served on the bundle. Handle NORTH-12 appears in the thread. 3. A handle attribution report linking NORTH-12 or the associated handset to Jordan Clarke is NOT served  (MG6C/ENC/03 outstanding). 4. Platform extraction and subscriber data are outstanding. Without served attribution material, the defence  cannot safely treat the handle or phone reference as proof of Jordan Clarke's role.

pages.label: Message extracts (1/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: MESSAGE_EXTRACTS === EXHIBIT JC/MSG/01 — MESSAGE EXTRACTS (served) Handle: NORTH-12 Date: 14/01/2026 — "2 on way — usual spot"

pages.label: Message extracts (2/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: MESSAGE_EXTRACTS === Date: 22/01/2026 — "Need reload tonight" Attribution: handle mapping to Jordan Clarke NOT served on bundle.

pages.label: Exhibit list
pages.text: === SECTION: EXHIBIT_LIST === EXHIBIT LIST — R v Jordan Clarke JC/MSG/01 — Message extracts — SERVED — pages 6-7 ENC/03 — Handle attribution report — NOT SERVED

pages.label: Listing
pages.text: === SECTION: LISTING === Plea and trial preparation — 20 January 2027, Crown Court at Northgate.
